name: Dra. Judith Espinosa Rodríguez
about: Soy Médico Materno Fetal GinecoObstetra Avalada por la U.N.A.M Con interés especial en embarazo normal y de alto riesgo. Tratamos al Embrión o Feto como paciente !!! Prenatal Diagnosis: Fetal DNA testing,Chorionic villus sampling (CVS), Amniocentesis and Ultrasound Doppler Fetal High-Risk Pregnancy Pre-birth preventive care Twin Gestation Multiple Gestations Fetal Anomaly Fetus with a birth defect Advanced Maternal Age Epilepsy and Women's Reproductive Health Asthma Cardiovascular disease Pregestational and Gestational Diabetes Diabetes Educator Chronic Hypertension Gestational Hypertension Preeclampsia Infectious disease HIV & Pregnancy Kidney disease Prior preterm labor Prior pregnancy loss Prior stillbirth Weight-related pregnancy complications Cervical Insufficiency Cervical cerclage (Vaginal) Benson's cerclage (Transabdominal) Obstetric hemorrhage: Ligation of the hypogastric arteries (HAL) Cesarean Hysterectomy Obstetrics hysterectomy
